title: calculate_contributions
description: Calculate China five insurances and housing fund (五险一金) contributions for employees. Computes employer and employee portions based on city-specific base amounts and rates for pension, medical, unemployment, work injury, maternity, and housing fund.

city.description: City code or name for local rates (e.g. 'shanghai', 'beijing', 'shenzhen', 'guangzhou')

salary_base.description: Monthly salary base for contributions as decimal string (capped by city min/max)

housing_fund_base.description: Housing fund base (if different from salary base)

housing_fund_rate.description: Housing fund rate as decimal (e.g. '0.07' for 7%, range typically 5-12%)

employee_type.description: Employee hukou type (affects rates in some cities)

include_supplementary.description: Include supplementary medical insurance and annuity if applicable
